title: Review
subtitle: Configure the default coverage, cost, and capacity behavior for strict Review.

overview.title: Review workflow
overview.description: Review can raise difficult or risky changes into a strict read-only review pass, then merge and validate the final report.

command.title: Strict review routing
command.description: These settings apply when Review selects the strict path for broad, risky, or explicitly strict review requests.

reviewers.title: Review coverage
reviewers.description: BitFun selects the right independent coverage for the current task without exposing reviewer orchestration.

qualityGate.title: Final quality check
qualityGate.description: Strategy depth, model choices, and capacity controls decide how broad the review should be before the result is summarized.

strategy.title: Review strategy
strategy.description: Choose the default depth for strict review. Each strategy carries built-in scope, runtime, and token behavior.

quick.label: Quick
quick.summary: Focused screening for high-confidence issues on clearly scoped changes.

normal.label: Standard
normal.summary: Balanced review coverage with practical evidence for day-to-day review.

deep.label: Strict
deep.summary: Broader review coverage for risky, broad, or release-sensitive changes.

execution.title: Execution policy
execution.description: Set safety limits for strict Review coverage when a target is broad or slow.
execution.reviewerTimeoutDesc: Maximum seconds for one coverage path. Set 0 to disable the cap.
execution.judgeTimeoutDesc: Final quality-check timeout in seconds. Set 0 to disable the cap.
execution.fileSplitThresholdDesc: Broaden coverage when the target file count exceeds this value.
execution.maxSameRoleInstancesDesc: Maximum parallel coverage paths for one strict Review direction.

capacity.title: Capacity and retry
capacity.description: Control how strict Review waits for capacity and whether unresolved coverage may retry after you opt in.

maxParallelReviewers.label: Max parallel review work
maxParallelReviewers.description: Maximum strict Review work to run at the same time. Higher values may start more model requests in parallel, hit provider rate limits sooner, and increase token spend.

maxQueueWaitSeconds.label: Max capacity wait
maxQueueWaitSeconds.description: How long strict Review may wait for capacity before continuing with core checks.

allowProviderCapacityQueue.label: Wait for provider capacity
allowProviderCapacityQueue.description: Wait through transient model capacity errors instead of immediately continuing with core checks. You can cancel waiting at any time.

allowBoundedAutoRetry.label: Allow bounded automatic retry
allowBoundedAutoRetry.description: After you opt in from a retry prompt, future strict reviews may retry smaller unresolved coverage within strict limits.

autoRetryElapsedGuardSeconds.label: Auto-retry elapsed guard
autoRetryElapsedGuardSeconds.description: Maximum extra elapsed time automatic retries may use in one strict review run.
